description: Derived relational index mapping a change_set to the canonical changes introduced by its commit relative to the commit's first parent. Rebuildable from `lix_commit.change_ids` plus the referenced `lix_change` rows; the unique constraint enforces at most one change per (entity, schema, file) tuple within a single change_set.

change_set_id.description: The change_set this element belongs to (references `lix_change_set.id`).

change_id.description: The canonical change introduced/adopted by the change_set's commit (references `lix_change.id`).

entity_id.description: Canonical JSON primary-key tuple denormalized from the referenced `lix_change` for fast entity-scoped queries and to anchor the unique constraint.

schema_key.description: Denormalized schema identifier from the referenced `lix_change`; part of the per-change_set uniqueness tuple.

file_id.description: Denormalized file scope from the referenced `lix_change`; NULL for engine-internal entities. Part of the per-change_set uniqueness tuple.
